zh.lifeSummary: Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol是Jean de Soligny的兒子，於大約1145年出生在英國戴文格亞特 托林頓。他於大約1164年與Isolda Iseult Dol在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 辛特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1217年之後在英國可瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol是Jean de Soligny的儿子，于大约1145年出生在英国戴文格亞特 托林頓。他于大约1164年与Isolda Iseult Dol在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 辛特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1217年之后在英国可瓦爾。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol was born about 1145, in Great Torrington, Devon, England as the son of Jean de Soligny. He married Isolda Iseult Dol about 1164, in St Neot, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died after 1217, in Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol est né environ 1145, à Great Torrington, Devon, Angleterre, fils de Jean de Soligny. Il a épousé Isolda Iseult Dol environ 1164, à St Neot, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé après 1217, à Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol wurde um 1145 in Great Torrington, Devon, England, als Sohn von Jean de Soligny geboren. Er hat um 1164 in St Neot, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Isolda Iseult Dol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb nach 1217 in Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol è nato il circa 1145 nel Great Torrington, Devon, England come figlio di Jean de Soligny. Lui sposato Isolda Iseult Dol circa 1164, nel St Neot, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1217, nel Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dolは約1145年にイギリスデボングレアト トリントンでJean de Solignyの息子として生まれた。約1164年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト ネオトでIsolda Iseult Dolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年以後にイギリスコルンワルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol(은)는 대략 1145년 영국 데폰 그리트 토링턴에서 Jean de Soligny의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1164년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 니오트에서 Isolda Iseult Dol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 이후 영국 코른월에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Great Torrington, Devon, Inglaterra filho de Jean de Soligny. Ele casou-se com Isolda Iseult Dol aproximadamente 1164, em St Neot, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1217, em Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol родился около 1145 г. в местности грит торрингтон, девон, Англия. Его отца звали Jean de Soligny. Он женился на женщине по имени Isolda Iseult Dol около 1164 г. в местности ст неот, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер после 1217 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия.

Se casó con Isolda Iseult Dol aproximadamente 1164, en St Neot, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1217, en Cornwall, Inglaterra.
